title: Hooligan BMX Skuzzer Switchblade Figure
issue_title: The Cast Steps Off the Page
creator_display: Hooligan BMX; character art associated with Damian X. Fulton
alt: Packaged custom Skuzzer Switchblade figure on Radical Rick illustrated card art.
summary: A packaged custom figure of Skuzzer Switchblade, preserving one of Radical Rick’s supporting characters as a contemporary physical collectible. The figure and illustrated card are documented together as the complete presentation.
provenance: Current Lititz BMX holding; acquisition details were not supplied in the artifact entry.
claims: No edition size, production date or material description was supplied.
details: Figure remains photographed in custom blister-card packaging.
Package label identifies the character as Skuzzer Switchblade.
Visible card art and branding are retained as evidence.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
